content.question: The Prime Minister managed to ___ any tricky questions asked by the interviewer.
Smoking has ___ his health; he coughs all the time.
I'm sure that living with a vegetarian has ___ me to eat less meat.
Before I pay for the painting, I need proof that it is a(n) ___ Picasso, not a copy.
If you have stomach-problems it is best to avoid ___ food.
Brazil earns the majority of its income from one ___: coffee.
He may appear to be ___ but in fact he doesn't mean what he says at all.
It is important not to ___ the rules of the competition.
The students ___ when they saw that their teacher had sat on some chewing gum.
The woman ___ with pleasure when she saw her daughter get off the plane.
